title: Parse Sitemap URLs
description: Discover URLs from sitemap.xml (urlset and sitemapindex documents, gzipped sitemaps, robots.txt Sitemap: directives, and sitemap image/video/news extensions) and emit one Snapshot record per discovered URL so the host can crawl an entire site from a single seed URL.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_MAX_URLS.description: Maximum number of URLs to emit from a single sitemap invocation

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_MAX_SITEMAP_DEPTH.description: Maximum recursion depth when following nested sitemap index files. 0 walks only the seed; 1 walks seed plus one level of children.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_MAX_SITEMAPS.description: Maximum number of sitemap documents to fetch across the entire walk (defense against an adversarial sitemap-index pointing at thousands of empty children). 0 disables the cap.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_TIMEOUT.description: Network timeout in seconds when fetching sitemap or robots.txt

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_USER_AGENT.description: User agent string for HTTP requests

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_INCLUDE_REGEX.description: Only URLs matching this regex are emitted (empty = no filter). The first PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_REGEX_INPUT_CAP characters of each URL are scanned to bound catastrophic regex risk.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_EXCLUDE_REGEX.description: URLs matching this regex are skipped (empty = no filter). Same scan-length cap as INCLUDE_REGEX.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_REGEX_INPUT_CAP.description: Maximum number of URL characters scanned by INCLUDE_REGEX / EXCLUDE_REGEX. Bounds catastrophic-backtracking risk.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_SAME_HOST_ONLY.description: Skip URLs whose host differs from the seed URL's host

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_DISCOVER_FROM_ROBOTS.description: When the seed URL is a site root, parse robots.txt for Sitemap: directives

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_FALLBACK_PATHS.description: Fallback sitemap paths to probe when no robots.txt sitemap was found

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_HTTP_RETRIES.description: Number of times to retry transient HTTP failures (408, 429, 5xx, or network errors)

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_HTTP_BACKOFF_SECONDS.description: Base delay for exponential backoff between retries

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_HTTP_MAX_REDIRECTS.description: Maximum HTTP redirects to follow per sitemap fetch (custom handler enforces this; rejects redirects to non-http(s) schemes and to private hosts unless ALLOW_PRIVATE_HOSTS is set)

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_MAX_RESPONSE_BYTES.description: Maximum on-the-wire response size, in bytes (default 50 MiB)

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_MAX_DECOMPRESSED_BYTE.description: Maximum size after gzip decompression, in bytes (default 200 MiB)

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_GZIP_MAX_RATIO.description: Maximum decompressed/compressed ratio. Sitemaps with a larger ratio are rejected as bombs. 0 disables the check.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_ALLOW_PRIVATE_HOSTS.description: Allow fetches / redirects to private, loopback, link-local, or multicast addresses. Off by default to prevent SSRF via crafted sitemaps.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_ALLOW_FILE_URLS.description: Allow file:// URLs in fetched sitemaps when the seed is not file://. Off by default; the seed is automatically permitted to be file:// for local testing.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_VERIFY_TLS.description: Verify TLS certificates on HTTPS sitemap fetches

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_ACCEPT_LANGUAGE.description: Optional Accept-Language header value (empty = omit header)

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_EMIT_IMAGE_URLS.description: Also emit URLs from <image:loc> elements (Sitemap image extension). Media URLs are filtered through the same scheme / host / regex pipeline as page URLs.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_EMIT_VIDEO_URLS.description: Also emit URLs from <video:content_loc> and <video:player_loc> (Sitemap video extension). Subject to the same URL policy as page URLs.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_EMIT_NEWS_TAG.description: Emit Tag records for values found in <news:publication><news:name> (Sitemap news extension).

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_PRIORITY_MIN.description: Skip URLs whose <priority> is below this threshold. Entries without a <priority> tag pass through by default; set PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_REQUIRE_PRIORITY=true to drop them instead. 0.0 disables the filter.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_REQUIRE_PRIORITY.description: When PRIORITY_MIN > 0, also drop URLs that have no <priority> tag. Off by default — most real sitemaps omit <priority>.

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_CHANGEFREQ_ALLOWED.description: If non-empty, only emit URLs whose <changefreq> appears in this list

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_SORT_BY.description: Output ordering: url (alpha), lastmod (newest first), priority (highest first), or order (preserve sitemap order)

PARSE_SITEMAP_URLS_VERBOSE.description: Emit per-sitemap diagnostic lines to stderr
